title: rubus clusii
intro: Rubus clusii, also known as Clusius' raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Iberian Peninsula and southwestern France. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Rubus clusii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help to prevent infections. Rubus clusii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in jams and preserves, although its medicinal properties are typically extracted through herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions.
